By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode passive answer collection-এর বদলে learning-এর জন্য AI ব্যবহারের focused উপায়। mode-টি একটি নির্দিষ্ট job ঘিরে তৈরি: careful reasoning দিয়ে identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, এবং other deep questions explore করুন।

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.

entries.value: urgency এবং effort অনুযায়ী prioritize করুন, tasks break down করুন, এবং status update করুন।

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: বিষয়গুলোকে অগ্রাধিকার দিন

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: topics prioritize করুন।

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: prioritize করুন, schedule করুন, practice এবং review add করুন, তারপর progress বদলালে adjust করুন।

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: prioritize করুন, oversized tasks shrink করুন, progress track করুন, এবং review দিয়ে close করুন।

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: প্রাইভেসি Policy | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Private saved chat URLs sitemap-listed নয় এবং llms.txt, llms-full.txt, বা JSON AI content catalog-এ included নয়।

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Private tutoring powerful, কিন্তু equally available নয়। free public AI learning platform আরও মানুষকে patient first place to learn দিয়ে সেই access gap reduce করতে সাহায্য করতে পারে।

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Private tutoring powerful, কিন্তু unevenly distributed। inspir AI ব্যবহার করে access widen করে, learner-কে active রেখে: answers-এর আগে hints, lectures-এর আগে questions, এবং explanation-এর পরে practice।

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Project Coach AI Learning Mode passive answer collection-এর বদলে learning-এর জন্য AI ব্যবহারের focused উপায়। mode-টি একটি নির্দিষ্ট job ঘিরে তৈরি: scope, milestones, blockers, এবং next actions দিয়ে school, creative, coding, বা personal project plan করুন।

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Project কোচ AI শেখার মোড: প্র্যাকটিক্যাল গাইড
